expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
Explains lazy allocation in terms of trap/page-fault handling or page-table invariants
expectations.evidence: Explains lazy allocation semantics, usertrap, uvmunmap, copyin/copyout, page alignment.

expectations.text: Requests the exact panic/trap information and a reproducible trigger
expectations.evidence: Requests code snippets but does not explicitly insist on exact panic/trap text plus minimal trigger as clearly as desired.
